note: BRAIN layer — Day 35 (Friday). All three warm-pipeline leads PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Final email close deadline 8 days past. LinkedIn buffer expired today (2026-05-02) — leads 1, 3, 22 can now be approached on LinkedIn from Monday 2026-05-04 (IMAP check must precede any approach). No further email outreach unless IMAP reveals unread reply.

pipeline_summary.email_channel: CLOSED — final close deadline was 2026-04-24. No further cold email to leads 1, 3, 22.
pipeline_summary.linkedin_channel: OPEN from today — buffer expired 2026-05-02. Preferred approach date Monday 2026-05-04.
pipeline_summary.linkedin_precondition: IMAP sweep must confirm no unread reply before any LinkedIn approach.
pipeline_summary.realistic_conversion_expectation: Very low via email. LinkedIn soft approach offers a marginal additional chance — leads must not feel stalked.
pipeline_summary.realistic_revenue_this_week: £0-350 (one surprise IMAP conversion possible; LinkedIn conversion 2-3 weeks away at earliest)

option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — no monthly cost objection.

if_reply_found_converted.action: Log CHANGELOG.md — CAMPAIGN MILESTONE #1 — FIRST REVENUE. Send invoice/agreement today. Delivery: 3-4 working days.
if_reply_found_converted.invoice_amount: £350 (Option B — most likely given her booking-gap pain point)

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Reply briefly: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.' Log in CRM. No further contact on any channel.

if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.action: Send ONE final close via email TODAY (before 12:00). Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE immediately after.
if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.final_close_body:
Claire,

Happy to leave this with you — I know May is a busy time for the salon.

If the booking system or the SSL fix rises to the top of the list, you know where I am.

All the best,
[Your name]
if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.deadline: Before 12:00 today — no extension. Email channel closes after this.

if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.action: Email channel closed. Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. LinkedIn soft approach available from Monday 2026-05-04 — curiosity-led, no reference to prior call or email.
if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.linkedin_note_guidance: Reference her salon or a local business topic. NO mention of website, SSL, booking, or the call. Connection note only — no pitch.

items.conversion_probability: Very low email. LinkedIn gives a final marginal chance.

items.upsell_signal: 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — strongest buying signal in the campaign. May is wedding + event season — print demand high.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

if_reply_found_deal_alive.action: Present options A/B/C. Close target: Monday 2026-05-05 (bank holiday — push to Tuesday 2026-05-06 if needed). Rob's 'sort the whole thing' signal points to Option B or C. Do not discount.
if_reply_found_deal_alive.note: May is peak print season (weddings, events, graduations). Rob may have been too busy in April and now has time.

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Brief thank-you. No further contact.

if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.action: Send ONE final close via email TODAY.
if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.final_close_body:
Rob,

Happy to leave this with you — if you do decide to sort the site, whether it's just the SSL or the full redesign, you know where I am.

All the best,
[Your name]

if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.action: Email channel closed. Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. LinkedIn soft approach available from Monday 2026-05-04.
if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.linkedin_note_guidance: Reference his print business or local business context. No mention of website, SSL, redesign, or prior email. Curiosity-led connection note only.

items.conversion_probability: Low-medium — Rob's bundle question remains the strongest buying signal. May seasonality may revive interest. IMAP is the final check.

if_reply_found_wants_to_proceed.action: Agree spec: quote form, 3-4 fields, email notification, mobile-friendly. Price: £100-150. Timeline: 2-3 days. Set a call slot this week.
if_reply_found_wants_to_proceed.note: May is peak spring carpentry season — Tom may have been genuinely too busy in April. Pain (no quote form) is still real and has not gone away.

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Brief reply. No further contact.

if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.action: Send ONE final close via email TODAY.
if_no_reply_and_no_final_close_was_sent.final_close_body:
Tom,

Going to leave this with you. If the quote form ever rises to the top of the list, you know where I am.

All the best,
[Your name]

if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.action: Email channel closed. Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. LinkedIn soft approach available from Monday 2026-05-04.
if_final_close_already_sent_still_silent.linkedin_note_guidance: Reference his carpentry work or a local North Yorkshire business topic. No mention of website, quote form, or prior email. Curiosity only.

items.conversion_probability: Low — 28 days of email silence. LinkedIn gives one final soft-touch opportunity.

if_any_converted.step_1: Write CHANGELOG.md immediately — 'Campaign milestone #1: first revenue — [business name], [amount]. [Date].'
if_any_converted.step_2: Begin delivery immediately. Send invoice or agreement today.
if_any_converted.step_3: Update lead status to 'converted' in database (leads table).

if_all_lost_or_no_response.step_1: Update each lead status: LOST or LOST_NO_RESPONSE in leads table.
if_all_lost_or_no_response.step_2: Log in CHANGELOG.md: 'Warm pipeline closed — leads 1, 3, 22 marked [status]. Campaign depends on Batch 5 for next revenue.'
if_all_lost_or_no_response.step_3: No further email contact. LinkedIn soft approach still available (Monday 2026-05-04).
if_all_lost_or_no_response.step_4: Records remain in CRM as closed — pipeline conversion rate data for retrospective.

post_resolution_protocol.gdpr_note: All three leads replied voluntarily to cold outreach. B2B legitimate interest. Final close emails (if not yet sent) are valid under the same basis. Log all sends in audit_log.

summary.email_channel_status: CLOSED (deadline passed). Final close emails (if not yet sent) can go today before 12:00. After that: email is done.
summary.linkedin_channel_status: OPEN from today. Preferred Monday 2026-05-04. IMAP sweep must precede.
summary.realistic_outcome: Zero to one email conversion. LinkedIn adds a low-probability second chance.
summary.hands_instruction: 1. IMAP sweep for all three before 09:00. 2. Act per decision trees above. 3. If final close not yet sent: send before 12:00. 4. Mark status immediately after each action. 5. LinkedIn BRAIN handles Monday approach planning.
